items.title: Clean water reaches three rural communities
items.author: Zahal Foundation
items.excerpt: New boreholes now bring safe drinking water to hundreds of families who once walked miles each day.

items.title: Back-to-school drive supports vulnerable children
items.author: Zahal Foundation
items.excerpt: Books, uniforms and fees helped dozens of children return to the classroom this term.

items.title: Free medical outreach in underserved areas
items.author: Zahal Foundation
items.excerpt: Volunteers delivered check-ups, medicines and maternal care to communities far from any clinic.

items.title: Skills training empowers women and youth
items.author: Zahal Foundation
items.excerpt: Our vocational programme is helping participants build sustainable livelihoods for their families.

items.title: Standing up for human rights and dignity
items.author: Zahal Foundation
items.excerpt: Awareness sessions are protecting vulnerable populations and promoting inclusive development.

items.title: Community clean-up builds a greener future
items.author: Zahal Foundation
items.excerpt: Tree-planting and clean-up drives are improving the environment and building climate resilience.
